data.title: Embla Medical buys 51% stake in Streifeneder ortho.production GmbH. Deal announced on July 17, 2025. #investment #healthcare.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Embla Medical (NASDAQ Copenhagen: EMBLA), a prominent provider of mobility solutions, announced their agreement to acquire a controlling stake of 51% in an undisclosed entity. The deal, valued at undisclosed amount, aims to bolster Embla Medical's position in the market and facilitate growth in innovative solutions. This move underscores Embla Medical's commitment to expanding its global presence and diversifying its portfolio.

data.title: YETI Holdings, Inc. to report Q2 fiscal year 2025 results on Aug 7, 2025, before market opens. Conference call at 8am ET. Phone: 800-717-1738.
data.description: A company based in Austin, Texas, YETI Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: YETI) revealed its intention to release its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 on Thursday, August 7, 2025, before the opening of the market. To delve into the financial outcomes, YETI will conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Those interested, such as investors and analysts, can join the call by dialing 800-717-1738 (for international callers: 646-307-1865) around 10 minutes before the call begins.

data.title: UNFI recognizes grocery retailers at 2025 show, with 5,300 attendees, 2,200 retail reps, and 900 supplier brands present.
data.description: United Natural Foods, Inc. hosted its initial Holiday and Winter Selling Show for 2025 in Providence, R.I., bringing together grocery retailers and supplier brands ahead of the peak sales season. The event witnessed over 5,300 participants, comprising around 2,200 UNFI retail customer representatives and over 900 supplier brands known for natural, organic, and fresh products. The show aimed to facilitate connections and collaborations in anticipation of the upcoming busy sales period.

data.title: Venu Holding Corp. selects Texas Capital Securities as financial advisor for private debt deals, targeting $200M commitments.
data.description: A company based in Colorado Springs, Venu Holding Corporation, known as “VENU,” operating in the upscale live music venues and premium hospitality sector, has disclosed that it is collaborating with TCBI Securities, Inc., also known as Texas Capital Securities. VENU, traded on NYSE American under VENU, has appointed Texas Capital Securities as its exclusive financial advisor. The purpose of this collaboration is to explore potential opportunities for private capital debt. The move signifies a strategic and financial decision by VENU to enhance its financial position. This partnership aims to leverage the expertise of Texas Capital Securities in navigating private capital markets for VENU's benefit. This development underlines the commitment of VENU to strengthening its financial standing through strategic partnerships and financial management.

data.title: Kohl's offers back-to-school staples under $10, focuses on style and savings for families. Chief Marketing Officer emphasizes value. as they prepare to head back to class this year.
data.description: Kohl’s, a retail company listed on the NYSE as KSS, is located in Menomonee Falls, Wisconsin. They are facilitating families in preparing for the upcoming school year by providing a wide range of everyday clothing, fashionable items, and over 100 back-to-school essentials priced below $10. Christie Raymond, the Chief Marketing Officer of Kohl’s, emphasized the importance of affordability for families during this time. The store aims to offer competitive prices on trusted brands and popular trends, ensuring a convenient shopping experience for everyone involved.

data.title: CWENCH Hydration by Cizzle Brands now in 300+ Sobeys locations in Canada, available in 4 flavors.
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) revealed that CWENCH Hydration™ is now available in over 300 Sobeys outlets. The ready-to-drink (“RTD”) line comes in Blue Raspberry, Rainbow Swirl, Tropical Flow, and Pink Lemon Flow flavors. The company notes that the increasing presence of CWENCH in Canadian hydration habits is enabled by its consistent availability in the grocery sector, acting as a significant growth factor.

data.title: SNICKERS® renews partnership with Orange Blossom Classic for third year. Exciting details to come for 2025 event.
data.description: In Miami Gardens, Florida on July 17, 2025, the Orange Blossom Classic Committee revealed its continued collaboration with Mars Wrigley, marking SNICKERS®' third year as the Official Chocolate of the Orange Blossom Classic (OBC). This partnership comes as part of the 2025 Invesco QQQ...

data.title: Del Webb Carolina Overlook introduces 20,000 sq ft clubhouse, new villa collection in Raleigh area.
data.description: In Clayton, North Carolina, Del Webb Carolina Overlook is making waves in the active adult living market. The prestigious Lakeview Manor clubhouse has officially opened, wowing residents and visitors alike. Additionally, the long-awaited villa collection has been launched, offering luxurious living options. This lakeside community is grabbing attention with a range of celebratory events scheduled for July. Situated in Wake and Johnston Counties, the community has become the go-to spot for active adults looking for a vibrant lifestyle. The impressive Lakeview Manor spans an impressive 20,000 square feet, providing top-notch amenities and facilities.

data.title: DiaMedica Therapeutics reports positive Phase 2 results for preeclampsia with significant blood pressure reductions and no placental transfer. ($DMAC)
data.description: In Minneapolis, DiaMedica Therapeutics Inc. shared encouraging interim results from Part 1a of the Phase 2 trial of DM199 aimed at treating preeclampsia. The study hit predetermined safety and efficacy targets for the Part 1a dose escalation phase, highlighting the promise of DM199. DM199, also known as rinvecalinase alfa, is a synthetic version of the KLK1 protein. This development underscores the potential for DM199 as a treatment for preeclampsia. The company's stock is listed as Nasdaq: DMAC.

data.title: Golden Valley Memorial Healthcare named to Becker's 2025 List of Great Community Hospitals, recognizing its patient-centered care.
data.description: In Clinton, Missouri, Golden Valley Memorial Healthcare (GVMH) has been chosen for the 2025 edition of Becker’s Hospital Review’s “Great Community Hospitals” list, recognizing their dedication to providing outstanding care and innovative health services in the region. This national acknowledgment showcases GVMH's commitment to delivering patient-centered healthcare. Community hospitals such as GVMH play a crucial role in America's healthcare infrastructure, guaranteeing residents in rural and suburban areas have access to essential medical services.

data.title: BWXT secures $2.6B contracts for naval nuclear reactor components to be delivered over next 6-8 years.
data.description: In Lynchburg, Virginia, BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) revealed that it has secured contracts from the U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program worth about $2.6 billion, encompassing potential options for future years. These contracts involve the production of components for naval nuclear reactors. The focus will be on aiding Virginia and Columbia-class submarines, alongside contributing to specific components for Ford-class aircraft carriers. Deliveries of the contracted products are slated over the next six to eight years.

data.title: 2025 Mercedes-AMG® C 43 Sedan unveiled at Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale, offering advanced features for enthusiasts.
data.description: Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale presents a wide range of options and thorough information on the 2025 Mercedes-AMG® C 43 Sedan, a luxurious and high-performance vehicle for car enthusiasts. Located in Scottsdale, Arizona, the dealership offers a blend of power and technology in this model. The 2025 Mercedes-AMG® C 43 Sedan is designed to cater to drivers seeking a mix of performance and luxury.

data.title: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP investigating REX American Resources (NYSE: REX) for possible shareholder breaches.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP disclosed an ongoing investigation into REX American Resources Corporation (NYSE: REX) aimed at safeguarding the interests of the company's shareholders. The inquiry focuses on assessing potential breaches by REX American Resources Corporation's directors.

data.title: Capital Laser Hair Removal marks 24 years as top laser hair removal provider in D.C. with global clientele and bright future.
data.description: A clinic in Arlington is marking 24 years of operation as a top spot for laser hair removal in the Washington, D.C. metro area. Capital Laser Hair Removal has gained a reputation for excellence, serving clients from around the world. With a bold vision for the future, the clinic aims to continue providing exceptional services to its clientele.

data.title: Investors skeptical of Trump's threats to Powell as tension rises. Markets unfazed, but Wall Street showing more worry.
data.description: The Federal Reserve chair has drawn increasing hostility from President Trump. While markets remain unconcerned at this point, there is growing unease among some individuals in the financial sector on Wall Street.
